title: Hugging Face launches agentic toolkit for Reachy Mini
title_zh: Hugging Face launches agentic toolkit for Reachy Mini
abstract:
Users describe the behavior they'd like to see in plain English, and the agent writes, tests, and ships the code to Reachy Mini. 
 The post  Hugging Face launches agentic toolkit for Reachy Mini  appeared first on  The Robot Report .
abstract_zh: Users describe the behavior they'd like to see in plain English, and the agent writes, tests, and ships the code to Reachy Mini. The post Hugging Face launches agentic toolkit for Reachy Mini appeared first on The Robot Report .
